use_cases: Comparing temperature trends between two cities over time
Displaying weather data with threshold zones between high and low values
Visualizing time-series data with filled threshold areas between two metrics
Dashboard data display for environmental or climate monitoring
Educational charts showing comparative datasets with clear visual boundaries
ai_summary: A threshold chart component from Airbnb's design system that visualizes comparative temperature data between New York and San Francisco over time. Uses @visx library to render SVG-based time-series visualization with dual axes, grid lines, and a filled threshold area between two data curves. Designed as a minimalist, flat data-display component suitable for dashboards and environmental monitoring interfaces.
